vocabulary.example: She wanted to do business abroad.
I don't have to do the dishes after I have a meal.
vocabulary.translation: 저는 밥을 먹은 뒤 설거지를 할 싶요가 없습니다.

vocabulary.example: I drop my mobile phone very often.
It can be broken during the delivery.
vocabulary.translation: 컴퓨터가 배송 중에 파손될 수 있습니다.

vocabulary.example: I use various electronic devices at work.
Our company provides excellent employee benefits.
vocabulary.translation: 우리 회사는 훌륭한 사원 복지 혜택을 제공합니다.

vocabulary.example: The price of the entrance fee should be reasonable.
I especially like a show called '10분 요리'
vocabulary.translation: 저는 특히 10분 요리라는 이름의 쇼를 좋아합니다.

vocabulary.example: It is inconvenient to exchange clothes.
It is easier to exchange opinions with friends.
